title: Small talk и знакомство
description: Лёгкий разговор: знакомство, погода, впечатления, семья, работа, хобби.

examples: Nice to meet you, I'm Andrey.
Nice to meet you, thanks for coming.
How are you doing today?
How are you doing this week?
I'm doing well, thanks. How about you?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking.
Where are you from originally?
Where are you from in Russia?
I'm from Moscow, near Troitsk.
I'm from Moscow, but I like traveling.
What do you do for work?
What do you do in your free time?

chunks.en: I work with outdoor kitchens and grills.
chunks.ru: Я работаю с уличными кухнями и грилями.
examples: I work with outdoor kitchens and grills in Moscow.
I work with outdoor kitchens, grills, and BBQ zones.
I have a son, his name is Tyoma.
I have a son and we learn English together.
He likes football and games like Clash Royale.
He likes football, Minecraft, and Clash Royale.
Do you have children?
Do you have children or pets?

chunks.en: What do you like to do?
examples: What do you like to do on weekends?
What do you like to do in your free time?

chunks.en: I like traveling with my family.
examples: I like traveling with my family in summer.
I like traveling with my family when we have time.
The weather is nice today, isn't it?
The weather is nice today for a walk.

chunks.en: It's a bit too hot today.
examples: It's a bit too hot today for me.
It's a bit too hot today, but it's okay.
Have you been here before?
Have you been to this city before?

chunks.en: This is my first time here.
examples: This is my first time here in this city.
This is my first time here, and I like it.
I've been here before with my family.
I've been here before, but not for long.
I really like this place, it feels calm.
I really like this place and the food is good.
It's a beautiful city with nice streets.
It's a beautiful city, especially in the evening.
How long are you staying in this city?
How long are you staying at this hotel?

chunks.en: We are staying for a week.
examples: We are staying for a week with my family.
We are staying for a week, maybe longer.
Do you speak English a little?
Do you speak English or Russian?
I speak a little English, but I'm learning.
I speak a little English and I want to practice.
I'm still learning, so please speak slowly.
I'm still learning English with my son.
Sorry for my English, I'm still learning.
Sorry for my English, I need more practice.
No worries, it's okay.
No worries, take your time.
Take your time, I can wait.
Take your time, there is no rush.

chunks.en: It was nice talking to you.
examples: It was nice talking to you today.
It was nice talking to you, see you later.
Have a good day, thank you.
Have a good day and see you later.
See you around, have a good day.
See you around next time.
